---
about:
  template: jolla
  image: source/myself_main.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/Fran_gfr
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/franfrutos
    - text: "{{< fa brands researchgate >}}"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Francisco-Garre-Frutos-2
    - text: "{{< fa brands linkedin-in >}}"
format: 
    html:
        css: styles.scss
        banner-header-class: "home"
---

Hey, this is my personal website (just born). Here I will post interesting things I learn along the way.
